title: iris unguicularis subsp. angustifolia
intro: Iris unguicularis subsp. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved crested iris, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
